$comment: Au Soleil Italien — full bilingual menu. This is the single source of truth for the menu. Categories render in the order listed here. Each item: name (proper name, kept as-is), price (string with € or null), description {fr,en}, and optional flags: isNew, hasVideo, time, tag. Edit freely — the UI is data-driven. When the backend API is ready, lib/menu.ts becomes the only file that needs to change.

note.fr: Notre pâte à pizza est pétrie sur place à partir de farine 100% italienne
note.en: Our pizza dough is kneaded in-house from 100% Italian flour
